title: cyclanthera longiflora
intro: Cyclanthera longiflora, also known as the calabash, is a type of vining plant native to Asia, belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and heal various health issues. The health benefits of Cyclanthera longiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Cyclanthera longiflora is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
